name: Hospitality (Zimbabwe)
definition: Businesses providing accommodation, food, beverage and tourism experiences: hotels, lodges, restaurants, bars, caterers and tour operators.

subSectors.name: Hotels and lodges
subSectors.description: Accommodation from city hotels to safari lodges.

subSectors.name: Restaurants and catering
subSectors.description: Food service from fine dining to fast food and events catering.

subSectors.name: Bars and nightlife
subSectors.description: Licensed liquor outlets and entertainment venues.

subSectors.name: Tour and safari operators
subSectors.description: Tours, transfers, activities and safari operations.

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Guest houses, small restaurants and single-vehicle tour operators.
Full-service hotels, lodges and multi-outlet restaurant groups.
Hotel groups and integrated tourism operators.

officialSizeThresholds.note: Official accommodation grading bands and MSME thresholds were not verified from an official source in this revision.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design. Tourism-authority registration and grading are declared as research gaps rather than described.
